status_endpoint.x_vqd_hash_1: Returns a base64-encoded JavaScript challenge (not a VQD token)

conclusion: DuckDuckGo AI (duckchat/v1) has implemented challenge-based anti-bot protection as of 2026-05. The VQD token protocol no longer works. Direct HTTP access is blocked (418 ERR_CHALLENGE). This affects the AI enrichment strategy defined in the contract.
alternatives: Use Ollama with local models (no API key needed)
Use DSPy with any API-key-backed provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)
Make AI enrichment fully optional - pipeline works without AI
Use free-tier APIs (Google Gemini free tier, etc.)
